chunks.en: Today I want to talk about restarting my computer.
chunks.ja: 今日はパソコンの再起動についてお話ししたいです。

chunks.en: When my computer gets slow, I restart it.
chunks.ja: パソコンの動きが遅くなったとき、私は再起動します。

chunks.en: First, I close all my open apps.
chunks.ja: まず、開いているアプリを全部閉じます。

chunks.en: Then I click restart and I wait a little.
chunks.ja: それから再起動を押して、少し待ちます。

chunks.en: I wait for it to start again.
chunks.ja: パソコンがもう一度立ち上がるまで待ちます。

chunks.en: After that, my computer runs much faster.
chunks.ja: その後、パソコンはずっと速く動きます。

chunks.en: Restarting often fixes small problems for me.
chunks.ja: 再起動は、小さな問題を直してくれることが多いです。

chunks.en: So I always try this first when something breaks.
chunks.ja: だから何か調子が悪いとき、私はいつもまずこれを試します。

outline: Opening: talk about restarting my computer
Point 1: I do it when it gets slow
Point 2: close apps, restart, and wait
Wrap-up: it fixes small problems, so I try it first

modelTalk.text: My computer gets slow sometimes. It doesn't work well, and that's annoying. So I decide to restart it. First, I close all my apps. I don't want to lose my work. I save my files, and then I click restart. Now I just wait. It takes a minute or two. I watch the screen and I'm patient. Soon the computer starts again. It feels fast and fresh. Wow, that's much better! This trick fixes small problems a lot. I don't need to call for help. I can do it myself. So when your computer feels slow, try it. Just restart it. It's easy, and it really works.

chunks.en: Today I want to talk about restarting my computer.
chunks.ja: 今日はパソコンの再起動について話したいです。

chunks.en: When my computer gets slow, I restart it.
chunks.ja: パソコンの動きが遅くなったら、私は再起動します。

chunks.en: First, I close all my apps before restarting.
chunks.ja: まず、再起動する前にすべてのアプリを閉じます。

chunks.en: Then I click the restart button and wait.
chunks.ja: それから再起動ボタンを押して待ちます。

chunks.en: I wait for it to start again slowly.
chunks.ja: 立ち上がるまでゆっくり待ちます。

chunks.en: This often fixes small problems very fast.
chunks.ja: これで小さな問題はすぐに直ることが多いです。

chunks.en: So restarting is an easy trick I use.
chunks.ja: だから再起動は私がよく使う簡単な方法です。

outline: Opening: talk about restarting my computer
Point 1: I close apps when it gets slow
Point 2: I wait for it to start again
Wrap-up: it fixes small problems easily

modelTalk.text: Sometimes my computer gets really slow. It stops working well, and that's annoying. So I restart it. First, I close all my apps. I save my work before I close them. That's important, so I don't lose anything. Then I click restart. Now I just wait. My computer goes dark for a moment. I wait for it to start again. It takes a minute or two. Then the screen comes back. Everything feels faster now. This often fixes small problems. It's an easy trick, and it usually works. I don't need a new computer. I just turn it off and on. That's it!
